features.title: Sprint Burndown Analysis
features.description: System for tracking sprint progress using story points, comparing actual completion against ideal burndown metrics.

features.title: Task Status Classification
features.description: Logic to categorize tasks based on completion date, due date, and story point estimation status.

features.title: Sprint Metric Calculation
features.description: Automated calculation of total estimated points, completed points, completion rate, and spillover metrics.

tasks.title: Implement Task Classification Logic
tasks.description: Develop logic based on decision tables to classify tasks into DONE, NOT_DONE, EARLY, ON_TIME, LATE, or SPILLOVER.

tasks.title: Develop Burndown Chart Engine
tasks.description: Calculate Expected vs Actual burndown based on daily completed story points.

tasks.title: Configure Metric Reporting
tasks.description: Implement formulas for Total Estimated, Total Completed, Completion Rate, and Spillover.

user_flows.name: Sprint Progress Tracking
steps: Input task data including story points, completion date, and due date
System classifies task status based on business rules
System calculates and displays burndown metrics and charts
